category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Trinidad and Tobago.

target_market_label.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥（TTBS / RIC / T&TEC）
target_market_label.zht: 千里達及托巴哥（TTBS / RIC / T&TEC）

title.en: China-to-Trinidad and Tobago EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入特立尼达和多巴哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入千里達及托巴哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Trinidad and Tobago TTBS / RIC / T&TEC requirements, 115/230 V 60 Hz grid conditions, Americas-region SAE J1772 AC and CCS1 DC connector expectations, UL 2202 / UL 2594 EVSE safety references, OCPP and EMC expectations, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与特立尼达和多巴哥TTBS / RIC / T&TEC要求、115/230 V 60 Hz电网条件、美洲地区交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1接口预期、UL 2202 / UL 2594电动汽车供电设备安全参考、OCPP及EMC预期，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與千里達及托巴哥TTBS / RIC / T&TEC要求、115/230 V 60 Hz電網條件、美洲地區交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1接口預期、UL 2202 / UL 2594電動汽車供電設備安全參考、OCPP及EMC預期，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Trinidad and Tobago, the fundamental gaps are grid and connector localisation. Trinidad and Tobago uses a 115/230 V, 60 Hz US-heritage electrical environment, while China domestic chargers are commonly designed around 220/380 V, 50 Hz. Both voltage and frequency differ, so input stages, protection, magnetics, PCS or inverter firmware, metering, thermal ratings, and power-quality behaviour must be revalidated for 60 Hz operation. The applicable Americas connector ecosystem is SAE J1772 for AC charging and CCS1 for DC charging. GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are physically and protocol incompatible and require hardware and firmware redesign. The EV market is nascent; exporters should confirm TTBS conformity, RIC regulatory expectations, and T&TEC grid-connection requirements for the specific product and site before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入特立尼达和多巴哥时，根本差距在于电网和接口本地化。特立尼达和多巴哥采用115/230 V、60 Hz、美国体系传承的电气环境，而中国国内充电桩通常围绕220/380 V、50 Hz设计。电压和频率均不同，因此输入级、保护、磁性器件、PCS或逆变器固件、计量、热额定值和电能质量表现均须按60 Hz重新验证。适用的美洲接口体系为交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1。GB/T 20234接口及GB/T 27930直流通信在物理和协议上不兼容，需要硬件及固件重新设计。该国电动汽车市场尚处初期；出口商出货前应针对具体产品和场站确认TTBS合格评定、RIC监管预期及T&TEC并网要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入千里達及托巴哥時，根本差距在於電網和接口本地化。千里達及托巴哥採用115/230 V、60 Hz、美國體系傳承的電氣環境，而中國國內充電樁通常圍繞220/380 V、50 Hz設計。電壓和頻率均不同，因此輸入級、保護、磁性器件、PCS或逆變器固件、計量、熱額定值和電能質量表現均須按60 Hz重新驗證。適用的美洲接口體系為交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1。GB/T 20234接口及GB/T 27930直流通訊在物理和協議上不兼容，需要硬件及固件重新設計。該國電動汽車市場尚處初期；出口商出貨前應針對具體產品和場站確認TTBS合格評定、RIC監管預期及T&TEC併網要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TTBS scope determination, RIC approval, T&TEC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Trinidad and Tobago conformity assessment rules, utility requirements, electrical-installation rules, and applicable standards with qualified professionals and the relevant authorities before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TTBS适用范围裁定、RIC批准、T&TEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士及相关主管部门核验特立尼达和多巴哥现行合格评定规则、公用事业要求、电气安装规则及适用标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TTBS適用範圍裁定、RIC批准、T&TEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士及相關主管部門核驗千里達及托巴哥現行合格評定規則、公用事業要求、電氣安裝規則及適用標準。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
